recentCommits.message:
refactor: update project structure and dependencies

- Renamed project from "Colorutils" to "rslib-project" in package.json.
- Updated package.json to use ES modules and added exports for different module formats.
- Changed build scripts to use rslib for building and watching.
- Updated devDependencies to include eslint, prettier, and rslib/core.
- Removed main.ts and refactored color utility functions into separate modules.
- Updated import statements to use single quotes for consistency.
- Added ESLint and Prettier configuration files for code quality.
- Updated TypeScript configuration for improved module resolution and strictness.
- Added Vitest configuration for testing.
- Refactored color generation functions to improve readability and maintainability.
- Added tests for HexadecimalModifier and HexadecimalValidator with updated import paths.
recentCommits.author: Black Light

readmes.name: main
readmes.readmeHtml:
Colorutils

various color formats and utilities

Format Opacity Typical Use Example
RGB No Digital displays rgb(255, 0, 0)
RGBA Yes Web, apps rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5)
Hex Optional Web, design #FF0000, #FF000080
HSL/HSLA Yes Design, animation hsl(0, 100%, 50%)
CMYK No Printing cmyk(0%, 100%, 100%, 0%)
HWB No CSS (new) hwb(0, 0%, 0%)
Grayscale No Simplified design gray(50%)
HSV/HSB No Visual tools hsv(0, 100%, 100%)
Named Colors No Web red, blue
